title: Pre-Approval Form Intake
summary: Turns a submitted pre-approval form into a tagged contact, new opportunity, team alert, and documented CRM record.
businessOutcome: Convert intake submissions into organized CRM work instantly instead of relying on manual data entry.
thumbnail: Forms create tagged opportunities and alert the team instantly.
problem: New intake forms create delays when assignment, notes, and pipeline setup happen separately.
solution: The workflow tags the contact, creates the opportunity, adds notes, assigns ownership, and notifies the team in one pass.
workflowOverview: Starts when the pre-approval form is submitted
Builds the CRM opportunity and ownership record
Adds internal notes and alerts the team
audience: Sales teams, intake coordinators, service businesses
